race.description: Wolf Blass, The Man, Hahndorf Museum Hcp (56)
race.comment: FLYWAY (1) is desperate to break through soon on the back of two consecutive minor placings. Strips rock-hard fit and only needs to hold his form to be right there again. BELLE FROM HELL (9) was much better last time when flashing home to finish within a length of the winner at Balaklava. Can keep the momentum rolling. DORA AURORA (10) skipped through the testing conditions last time at Mt Gambier to get the verdict. Is open to further improvement fourth-up and is worth following. CHANCE TAKEN (4) got too far back first-up but did warm nicely late. Is drawn to get back again but can cause a late scare if the tempo is genuine. HARLEY'N'ROSE (7) returns short of a preferred trip but is a handy type on his day and strips fitter for two trials. Not dismissing.
